contact.title: Say hello
contact.description: Questions about membership, the app, or what life inside the club is really like? We're here. Drop us a line and we'll get back to you.

notifications.error: We couldn't send your message. Please try again in a moment.
notifications.success: Thanks — your message is on its way. We'll be back to you soon.

about.title: Opening the gates to a different kind of ownership.
about.description: A modern, community-driven shared racehorse ownership club.
about.fallbackAbout:
Rionna is a shared racehorse ownership club built for a new generation of owners. We care as much about the horses as we do about the people following their journey — members who come from every corner of the racing world (and plenty who are brand new to it).

We believe ownership should feel personal, connected, and joyful. That the finish line isn't the only moment worth celebrating. That the sport gets better when it makes room for more voices.

This is the club we wanted to be part of. We hope you'll join us.

openGates.title: Room for more voices.
openGates.description: Ownership has never been more accessible. We're breaking down the cultural, financial, and emotional barriers that kept racing feeling closed off.

leadWithCare.title: Horse first, always.
leadWithCare.description: Welfare is the baseline — from the yard through retirement — and the same care shapes how we look after our members.

findJoy.title: Share the moments.
findJoy.description: Parade ring nerves, the roar in the stands, a winner in the yard at dawn. Ownership is the excuse — the shared moments are the point.

membership.title: Join the club.
membership.description: One membership. All the horses, all the races, the community, the moments. No tiers, no small print, cancel any time.

plan.title: Full membership
plan.priceNote: Billed monthly. Cancel any time from your account.

features.stables: Track every horse in the stable — bios, photos, trainer notes
features.liveRaceData: Live entries, declarations, and results powered by Timeform
features.community: Private members' community — posts, polls, trainer Q&A, events
features.pushAlerts: Real-time push alerts when horses are declared or run
features.trainerUpdates: Trainer updates straight from the yard
features.exclusiveNews: Members-only news, interviews, and behind-the-scenes content

whatIncluded.question: What's included with a membership?
whatIncluded.answer: Everything. Access to the mobile app (Stables, Pulse, Community), real-time push alerts, members-only news, and the full Circle community. No tiered plans to navigate.

howToCancel.question: How do I cancel?
howToCancel.answer: From the website account page — one click, no calls, no forms. Your membership stays active until the end of the billing period.

tierChanges.question: Are there different membership tiers?
tierChanges.answer: Not for now. One flat membership for everyone, which keeps the community simple and the ownership experience consistent.

appSupport.question: Which devices does the app work on?
appSupport.answer: iOS and Android, from the App Store and Play Store. Billing stays on the website — nothing goes through Apple or Google.

news.title: The latest from the yard.
news.description: Race previews, results, interviews, and stories from the stable.
news.empty: No posts yet — check back soon.

hero.title: Open the gates. Own the moments.
hero.subtitle: A modern racehorse ownership club built around a stable full of Flat and National Hunt horses — and a community of people who love being close to the action.

horses.title: Meet the horses.
horses.description: Every member follows every horse — from the yard, through the race, to the post-run debrief.

features.title: Everything members get.
features.description: Ownership, made present. The tools and the moments that make it feel live.

stables.title: Our Stables
stables.description: Photos, bios, trainer updates, race history — the full profile of every horse in the club, always up to date.

pulse.title: Pulse dashboard
pulse.description: What's next, what just happened. Declarations, results, and the latest news in one place when you open the app.

community.title: Members' community
community.description: Private discussion for every horse, trainer Q&A, events, and the conversations you'd only get sitting together at the track.

alerts.title: Real-time alerts
alerts.description: Push notifications the moment a horse is declared, a result is in, or a trainer drops an update.

finalCta.title: Ownership, made personal.
finalCta.description: One flat membership. All the horses, all the races, all the moments.

footer.tagline: A modern shared racehorse ownership club. Open the gates. Own the moments.
